meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no testing knowledge (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no testing knowledge. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Solve Testing Gaps for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Bridge the testing gap in your SaaS builds using the Antigravity template and Claude Code. A masterclass for freelance developers to ship reliable code faster.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates the 'no testing' bottleneck by providing a pre-configured, modular architecture with integrated test harnesses. By pairing this scaffold with Claude Code, freelancers can automate unit and integration test generation, ensuring production-grade reliability without manually writing boilerplate or deep-diving into complex testing framework configurations.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a production deadline. The client wants a feature-rich MVP by Friday, but your codebase is a house of cards—zero tests, high technical debt, and a sinking feeling that one wrong commit will bring the whole thing down. You aren't a QA engineer; you're a builder who needs to move fast without breaking things.

The industry standard for 'moving fast' is no longer skipping tests; it’s automating them. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you gain a structural advantage that turns testing from a manual chore into a side-effect of your development process. Stop gambling with client deployments and start shipping with mathematical certainty.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the base architecture which includes pre-configured testing hooks and environment isolation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard template with integrated Vitest and Playwright configurations.

steps.title: Define Domain Models with Test Constraints
steps.description: Use AI to define your data layer alongside its validation tests to prevent regression from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a User domain model. Include a corresponding test file that validates schema constraints and edge cases.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate domain model and tests for User entity based on schema.prisma'

steps.title: Automate Integration Test Scaffolding
steps.description: Generate integration tests for API endpoints using the template's built-in mocking utilities.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate integration tests for the AuthController, mocking the database layer and asserting 200/401 responses.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate integration tests for src/controllers/auth.ts'

steps.title: Implement 'Test-First' Feature Iteration
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write the test before the implementation logic, ensuring 100% coverage on new features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a failing test case for the new subscription billing logic, then implement the logic to pass it.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement billing logic for SubscriptionService.ts, test-driven'

steps.title: Run Full Regression Suite
steps.description: Execute the entire test battery to verify that new code hasn't introduced side effects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the full test suite and summarize any performance regressions detected.

pro_tips: Always use the 'watch' mode in your CLI when running tests with Claude Code to get instant feedback loops.
Tag your tests with @critical for core business logic so you can run a subset of tests during CI/CD to save time.
Treat your test files as living documentation; use descriptive 'it' blocks that explain the business requirement, not just the code.
Use Claude Code to generate 'snapshot' tests for UI components to catch visual regressions instantly.
Never merge code if the coverage report drops below 80%—automate this check in your git pre-commit hooks.
content.next_steps: Configure a CI/CD pipeline like GitHub Actions to run your test suite automatically on every push, ensuring your freelance client projects remain stable long after you deliver the final build.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting testing anxiety slow your delivery. Leverage the Antigravity framework to build faster, test smarter, and scale your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
